puzzleInfo.title: Bosnian Whisper
puzzleInfo.ruleset:
Sudoku rules apply.

**Cell Center Loop**: Draw a single loop that travels orthogonally and passes through the centers of cells. The loop may go straight through a cell or turn within a cell, but it cannot branch, cross itself.

 - **Cell Center Loop Cannot Touch Orthogonally**: Draw a 1-cell wide loop of orthogonally connected cells, which does not branch or touch itself orthogonally, but can touch itself diagonally.

 - **Cell Center Loop Cannot Touch Diagonally**: Draw a 1-cell wide loop of orthogonally connected cells, which does not branch or touch itself diagonally.

 - **Adjacent Cells Along Loop Are German Whispers**: Adjacent cells along a loop differ by 5 or more.

**Cell Not On The Loop**: A black circle indicates the cell is not on the loop.

**Count Loop Neighbour Cells**: An orange circle indicates how many cells up to 8 surrounding cells plus itself (9 maximum) are on the loop.
